experimental_actions.title: Require Explicit Citations
experimental_actions.description: Force the LLM to append [Chunk-ID] to every sentence it generates.
experimental_actions.observed_evidence: LLM struggles to maintain factual fidelity across long generation spans.
experimental_actions.root_cause: Lack of forced intermediate reasoning (citations) causes drift from context.
experimental_actions.expected_improvement: Self-correction during generation ensures every fact is linked to evidence.
experimental_actions.success_metric: 100% of claims map cleanly to a cited chunk.
experimental_actions.tradeoff: Increases output token length and adds parsing overhead.
